actions.message: 🎖️ WELCOME TO SLAYER BOOT CAMP, RECRUIT.
🚜 GOOD. PICK UP THE PISTOL AHEAD. 🔫
🔫 GUN DOWN THE CUTE BUNNY WITH THE PISTOL. 🐰
🎯 NICE SHOOTING. PICK UP THE CHAINSAW AHEAD. 🪚
🪚 GRIND THE ANGRY BUNNY WITH THE CHAINSAW. 😡
💥 BRUTAL. PICK UP THE SHOTGUN AHEAD. 🔫
🔫 BLAST THE ZOMBIE BUNNY WITH THE SHOTGUN. 🧟
💥 CLEAN. PICK UP THE ROCKET LAUNCHER AHEAD. 🚀
🚀 BLOW AWAY THE SCARY BUNNY WITH THE ROCKET. 👹
🎖️ OUTSTANDING. THE HELL SPAWN HARE AWAITS — ALL WEAPONS FREE. 👹🔥
